project.selectDirectory: Select a directory for your project. You can also create a new directory.
project.projectNamePlaceholder: Leave empty to use directory name
project.createDirectory: Create the directory if it doesn't exist
project.sharedProject: Shared project (accessible by other team members)

chat.typeToBegin: Type your message below to begin
chat.remoteDisconnected: Remote session disconnected. Please refresh to create a new session.
chat.remoteEnded: Remote session has ended. Please refresh to create a new session.
chat.remoteNotFound: Remote session not found or has ended
chat.remoteEndedCreate: Remote session has ended. Please create a new session.

permission.title: Permission Required
permission.wantsToUse: Qwen wants to use the {{command}} command.
permission.wantsToUseMultiple: Qwen wants to use the following commands:
permission.proceedHint: Do you want to proceed? (Press ESC to deny, Enter to confirm)
permission.yesPermanent: Yes, and don't ask again for {{commands}} command
permission.yesPermanentMulti: Yes, and don't ask again for {{commands}} commands

quota.exceededMessage: Your token or request quota has been exhausted. Please contact the administrator.

commandLoop.title: Command Result Loop Detected
commandLoop.description: The AI is repeatedly executing the same command with the same error. This indicates the current approach is not working and the AI may be stuck in a loop.

projectSelector.title: Your Projects
projectSelector.removeConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to remove "{{name}}"? This will delete the project's chat history but won't affect the actual directory on disk.

slashCommands.clearConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to clear the conversation history? This action cannot be undone.

contextPanel.title: Context Usage
contextPanel.noApiData: No API response yet. Send a message to see actual usage.
contextPanel.estimatedInfo: Sub-categories are proportionally estimated from visible messages. Actual distribution may vary.
contextPanel.cacheInfo: Overhead is based on API cache data (more accurate). Sub-categories are proportionally scaled to match.
